attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG.CLAIM_ID,
 STG.CLAIM_COMMENT,
 STG.CREATED_DATE,
 STG.EXTRA_SPLITS,
 'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
 STG.SPLIT_PERCENT,
 STG.STATUS_CODE,
 STG.CLAIM_TYPE_CODE,
 STG.SHR_SALESREP_ID,
 STG.CROSS_THEATRE,
 STG.END_USER_COUNTRY_ISO_CODE,
 STG.UPDATED_DATE,
 STG.REPORT_EU_PARTY_ID,
 STG.CLAIMING_REASON,
 STG.SALES_INCENTIVE_CODE,
 STG.SALES_PROGRAM_NAME,
 STG.SALESREP_NUMBER,
 STG.TERR_TYPE_CODE,
 STG.SALES_TYPE_NAME,
 STG.CREATED_BY,
 STG.REPORTED_END_USER_NAME,
 STG.UPDATED_BY,
 STG.APPROVED_BY,
 STG.DELETED_BY,
 STG.REPORTED_END_USER_DIFFERENT,
 STG.REJECTED_BY,
 STG.REJECTION_REASON,
 STG.SO_NUMBER,
 STG.GLOBAL_NAME,
 STG.TO_BE_APPROVED_BY_NODE,
 STG.TO_BE_APPROVED_BY,
 STG.CLAIM_STATUS_NAME,
 STG.NODE_ID,
 STG.SEGMENT1,
 STG.SS_CODE,
 STG.PARTNER_BE_NAME,
 STG.PARTNER_PGTMV_ID,
 STG.BATCH_ID, 
 STG.CREATE_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$STGDB.ST_OTM_GCT_CLAIMS STG
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_SALES_CREDIT_CLAIM   WK
WHERE WK.BK_SALES_CREDIT_CLAIM_ID_INT=STG.CLAIM_ID )

SELECT 
EX.CLAIM_ID,
 EX.CLAIM_COMMENT,
 EX.CREATED_DATE,
 EX.EXTRA_SPLITS,
 EX.SPLIT_PERCENT,
 EX.STATUS_CODE,
 EX.CLAIM_TYPE_CODE,
 EX.SHR_SALESREP_ID,
 EX.CROSS_THEATRE,
 EX.END_USER_COUNTRY_ISO_CODE,
 EX.UPDATED_DATE, 
 EX.REPORT_EU_PARTY_ID,
 EX.CLAIMING_REASON,
 EX.SALES_INCENTIVE_CODE,
 EX.SALES_PROGRAM_NAME,
 EX.SALESREP_NUMBER,
 EX.TERR_TYPE_CODE,
 EX.SALES_TYPE_NAME,
 EX.CREATED_BY,
 EX.REPORTED_END_USER_NAME,
 EX.UPDATED_BY,
 EX.APPROVED_BY,
 EX.DELETED_BY,
 EX.REPORTED_END_USER_DIFFERENT,
 EX.REJECTED_BY,
 EX.REJECTION_REASON,
 EX.SO_NUMBER, 
 EX.GLOBAL_NAME,
 EX.TO_BE_APPROVED_BY_NODE,
 EX.TO_BE_APPROVED_BY,
 EX.CLAIM_STATUS_NAME,
 EX.NODE_ID,
 EX.SEGMENT1,
 EX.SS_CODE,
 EX.PARTNER_BE_NAME,
 EX.PARTNER_PGTMV_ID,
 EX.BATCH_ID,
 EX.CREATE_DATETIME 
  FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_GCT_CLAIMS EX
WHERE EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI' AND  NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_GCT_CLAIMS  STG
WHERE STG.CLAIM_ID=EX.CLAIM_ID)

SELECT
SOGC.CLAIM_ID				AS BK_SALES_CREDIT_CLAIM_ID_INT
,SOGC.SALES_PROGRAM_NAME		AS SALES_PROGRAM_NAME
,SOGC.REJECTION_REASON	AS RU_BK_REJECTION_REASON_CD
,SOGC.CLAIM_STATUS_NAME		AS CLAIM_STATUS_NAME 
,SOGC.CREATED_DATE			AS CLAIM_CREATED_DT
,SOGC.SALES_TYPE_NAME 		AS SALES_TYPE_NAME
,SOGC.CLAIM_TYPE_CODE		AS CLAIM_TYPE_CD
,SOGC.SALES_INCENTIVE_CODE	AS SALES_INCENTIVE_CD
,SOGC.REPORTED_END_USER_NAME	AS SOURCE_REPORTED_END_USER_NAME
,SOGC.SPLIT_PERCENT			AS CLAIM_SPLIT_PCT
,SOGC.EXTRA_SPLITS			AS CLAIM_EXTRA_CRDT_SPLTS_CMT_TXT
,SOGC.CLAIM_COMMENT			AS CLAIM_CMT_TXT
,SOGC.CROSS_THEATRE			AS CROSS_THEATER_FLG
,CASE WHEN SOGC.SALES_TYPE_NAME='1-Tier'
 THEN 'BOOKING' ELSE 'POS'
 END  AS TRX_TYPE
,SOGC.UPDATED_DATE			AS LAST_UPDATE_DTM
,SOGC.REPORTED_END_USER_DIFFERENT	AS DIFFERENT_END_USER_COUNTRY_FLG
,NISC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE           	AS ISO_COUNTRY_CD
,NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER  	AS SALES_REP_NUM
,NESRT.SALES_REP_NUMBER	AS CLAIMANT_SALES_REP_NUM
,COALESCE(NLDC.LDAP_USER_ID,'UNKNOWN')				AS SOURCE_CREATED_BY_USER_ID
,COALESCE(NLDU.LDAP_USER_ID,'UNKNOWN')				AS UPDATED_BY_USER_ID
,NSCR.BK_SLS_CREDIT_CLAIM_REASON_CD	AS BK_SLS_CREDIT_CLAIM_REASON_CD
,NPRT.PARTY_KEY				AS REPORTING_END_USER_PARTY_KEY
,NSTA.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD	AS SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD
,COALESCE(NLDT.LDAP_USER_ID,'UNKNOWN')			AS RU_APPROVER_USER_ID
,COALESCE(NSTT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999)	AS RU_APPROVER_SALES_TERR_KEY
,COALESCE(NLDA.LDAP_USER_ID,'UNKNOWN')			AS RU_APPROVED_BY_USER_ID
,COALESCE(NLDD.LDAP_USER_ID,'UNKNOWN')			AS RU_DELETED_BY_USER_ID
,CASE 
WHEN NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NOT NULL 	THEN NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY	
WHEN NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND NSOT.SS_CODE='BV' THEN -8888
WHEN NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL AND NSOT.SS_CODE='QTC' THEN -9999
END AS RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY
,COALESCE(NLDR.LDAP_USER_ID,'UNKNOWN')			AS RU_REJECTED_BY_USER_ID
,COALESCE(NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) AS  SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 			EDW_CREATE_DTM
,USER  					EDW_CREATE_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 			EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,USER  					EDW_UPDATE_USER
,SOGC.PARTNER_BE_NAME AS SRC_RPRTD_CHANNEL_PARTNER_NAME
,COALESCE(NCP.PARTNER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS CHANNEL_PARTNER_PARTY_KEY
,'I'				ACTION_CODE
,'='					DML_TYPE
 

FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_GCT_CLAIMS SOGC
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NISC
ON SOGC.END_USER_COUNTRY_ISO_CODE=NISC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESR
ON SOGC.SALESREP_NUMBER=NESR.SALES_REP_NUMBER
AND NESR.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_SALES_REP_TV NESRT
ON SOGC.SHR_SALESREP_ID=NESRT.RU_SK_EMP_NON_EMP_ID_INT
AND NESRT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
LEFT JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_LDAP_USER NLDC
ON NLDC.LDAP_USER_ID=SOGC.CREATED_BY
LEFT JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_LDAP_USER NLDU
ON NLDU.LDAP_USER_ID=SOGC.UPDATED_BY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_CREDIT_CLAIM_REASON NSCR
ON NSCR.BK_SLS_CREDIT_CLAIM_REASON_CD=SOGC.CLAIMING_REASON
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPRT
ON NPRT.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT=SOGC.REPORT_EU_PARTY_ID
AND NPRT.SS_CODE='CR'
AND NPRT.END_TV_DATE= '3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE NSTA
ON NSTA.BK_SLS_TERR_ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD=SOGC.TERR_TYPE_CODE
LEFT JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_LDAP_USER NLDA
ON NLDA.LDAP_USER_ID=SOGC.APPROVED_BY
LEFT JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_LDAP_USER NLDT
ON NLDT.LDAP_USER_ID=SOGC.TO_BE_APPROVED_BY
LEFT JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_LDAP_USER NLDD
ON NLDD.LDAP_USER_ID=SOGC.DELETED_BY
LEFT JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_LDAP_USER NLDR
ON NLDR.LDAP_USER_ID=SOGC.REJECTED_BY
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
ON NSOT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT =SOGC.SO_NUMBER
AND NSOT.SS_CODE= SOGC.SS_CODE 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NSTT
ON SOGC.TO_BE_APPROVED_BY_NODE=NSTT.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT
AND NSTT.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY_TV NST
ON SOGC.NODE_ID=NST.SHARE_NODE_ID_INT 
AND NST.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CHANNEL_PARTNER NCP
ON SOGC.PARTNER_PGTMV_ID=NCP.BK_PGTMV_PARTNER_ID_INT
